message:
🌱 Remove legacy typo and link checker workflows (#681)

* 🌱 Remove legacy caller workflow

Replaced by gh-aw agentic workflow in llm-d-infra.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* 🌱 Remove legacy caller workflow

Replaced by gh-aw agentic workflow in llm-d-infra.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,8 +0,0 @@
-name: Check Typos
-on:
-  pull_request:
-  push:
-
-jobs:
-  typos:
-    uses: llm-d/llm-d-infra/.github/workflows/reusable-typos.yml@main

@@ -1,11 +0,0 @@
-name: Markdown Link Check
-on:
-  push:
-    branches: [main]
-  pull_request:
-    branches: [main]
-  workflow_dispatch:
-
-jobs:
-  links:
-    uses: llm-d/llm-d-infra/.github/workflows/reusable-md-link-check.yml@main
